summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Certificate Templates, Landing Page Editor, Ad Simulations Copy URL, and mobile menu flash fix. All features working correctly.

issues: Route mismatch: Sidebar shows '/cert-templates' but actual route is '/certificate-templates'. Same for Ad Simulation showing in sidebar but route is '/ads'

critical_code_review_comments: Certificate Templates page uses correct data-testid='certificate-templates-page'
Landing Page Editor uses correct data-testid='landing-page-editor'
Mobile menu flash fix correctly implemented using isReady state before showing nav items
copyTrackingUrl function correctly creates masked URLs in format '/track/{campaign_id}'
seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 certificate template presets and verified existing ad templates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate limiter on login is 5 requests/minute. Routes: /certificate-templates (not /cert-templates), /landing-editor, /ads (not /ad-simulations). Certificate templates presets exist (Classic Professional, Modern Minimal, Corporate Blue).

certificate_templates_page.details: Page loads with 'Add Presets' and 'New Template' buttons. Templates tab shows 3 preset templates (Classic Professional as Default, Modern Minimal, Corporate Blue). Assets tab available for signatures and certifying bodies. Edit and Set Default buttons functional.

landing_page_editor.details: Page loads with 4 default sections (hero, 2x features, cta). Reorder controls (up/down arrows), visibility toggle (eye icon), and delete buttons available. Add Section, Preview, Reset, Save Changes buttons visible. Quick Tips and Available Placeholders panels shown.

ad_simulations_page.details: Page loads with Campaigns and Templates tabs. Campaign filter dropdown working. New Campaign button visible. Empty state message shown when no campaigns exist.

copy_tracking_url_feature.details: VERIFIED VIA CODE REVIEW - copyTrackingUrl function creates masked URLs in format '{origin}/track/{campaign_id}'. Uses clipboard API with fallback. Shows visual feedback (green check, 'Copied!' text). Copy URL button has data-testid='copy-url-{campaign_id}'.

mobile_menu_flash_fix.details: VERIFIED - PublicNav.js and LandingPage.js use isReady state (mounted && !isLoading && branding !== null) before showing nav items. Hamburger menu only appears after branding is loaded and there are nav items. Mobile view tested at 390x844 viewport.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/certificate-templates/default - Returns default template with elements
